title: HWG - Custom Recipes
description: A custom recipe Data pack for Happiness (is a) Warm Gun mod.
body:
Ever wanted to find use for the copper stockpile you have?
Are the special weapons you want feels too risky to get or just not dropping at all?
Or are you simply not in the mood to/can't trade with gunsmith villagers?

Well this data pack got you covered!

## Features
Examples
- Integrates copper into ammunition crafting - Enemy-dropped and tradable weapons are craftable - Tweaked existing recipes
Supported Mods

There are plenty of supported mods to make sure your materials won't be left out.

### Installing Drop the data pack file into the `datapacks` folder inside your world. ### Modifying Recipes Feel free to edit the data pack's recipes to your liking, if you don't know how to, follow these steps: 1. Go to **Data Pack > data > hwg > recipes** 2. Add or edit any JSON file inside the directory. - If the recipe ID is the same as the base mod, it will overwrite them instead.
